summary: A clip from a Fox News interview. Two men in suits sit facing each other in armchairs in a sitting room with framed photos on side tables; the lower-third reads DEPORTATION GOALS, TRUMP IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT, with an EXCLUSIVE marker. A closer shot shows the interviewee, a bearded man in a dark suit, with a U.S. flag and a Homeland Security backdrop behind him.

script.scene: Two men in suits sit facing each other in armchairs; lower-third reads DEPORTATION GOALS, TRUMP IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT.
A closer shot of the bearded interviewee speaking in front of a U.S. flag and Homeland Security backdrop.
Continued interview footage with the EXCLUSIVE and BREAKING TONIGHT markers.

notable_text: DEPORTATION GOALS; TRUMP IMMIGRATION ENFORCEMENT; EXCLUSIVE; BREAKING TONIGHT; FOX NEWS
